params.name: Eldhrimnir
params.description:
On Sep 15, 3500 BC, Odin commanded his god-chef to settle in Valhalla.
Valhalla is a place that receives the spirits of deceased warriors. Those who enter are brave warriors from earthly battles. To accommodate these fearless fighters, the god-chef Andhelimnir uses Eldhrimnir to cook the divine pig Saehrimnir, which is revived every day, to make delicious feasts for them to enjoy.
